evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Documenter l'ensemble des datasets : garantir une documentation claire et exploitable pour les équipes qui prendront le relais.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signals (architecture design, documentation, best practices, data reliability/enrichment) dominate throughout with no velocity/shipping-speed language present.
evidence.domain_risk: Enrichir et fiabiliser la donnée : nettoyer et enrichir les datasets directement dans Looker.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The role builds an internal analytics foundation for a consultancy's own Self-Service BI practice with no financial reporting, regulatory, or public-facing product exposure mentioned.
evidence.data_team_maturity: avant la bascule vers un modèle de Self Service BI porté par les Data Analysts... poser les fondations d'une plateforme analytique qui va durer
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The candidate is explicitly asked to 'cadrer un chantier de modélisation depuis zéro' (frame a modelling project from zero) and lay the foundations of a lasting analytics platform, matching early-stage/greenfield data team maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Construire le modèle sémantique : créer et déployer le modèle sémantique principalement via dbt, avec une couche Gold connectée à Looker.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Responsibilities name precise tools, methodology, and layered architecture (dbt, LookML, Bronze/Silver/Gold medallion, GCP, GitLab CI/CD), clearly conveying what the person does day to day.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: avant la bascule vers un modèle de Self Service BI porté par les Data Analysts
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The primary audience is the internal data platform and its eventual self-service consumers (Data Analysts), not a specific commercial, product, or finance function.
evidence.autonomy_level: tu auras l'opportunité de cadrer et de piloter un chantier de A à Z, avec une vraie autonomie technique... Tu es autonome et sais cadrer un chantier de modélisation depuis zéro.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role explicitly grants the candidate ownership to frame and drive the entire project from scratch with real technical autonomy, matching strategic direction-setting.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools for the candidate's own work or AI systems consuming the candidate's data output.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal present.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No mention of dbt tests, data contracts, or quality/testing frameworks; only documentation and data enrichment/reliability practices are named.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed entirely in delivery and foundation-building terms ('poser les fondations', 'chantier stratégique') with no risk register, compliance, or reliability language.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Tu es autonome et sais cadrer un chantier de modélisation depuis zéro. ... poser les fondations d'une plateforme analytique qui va durer
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role explicitly frames and builds a modelling project from zero and lays the foundations of a lasting analytics platform, matching greenfield.
evidence.language_gate: JD written entirely in French for a Suresnes-based role, implying French fluency required
evidence.work_arrangement: Télétravail fréquent (frequent remote work, paired with an office location in Suresnes)
